creator: hysoka@gmail.com
text:
I experienced random kernel panic since I changed the RAM from 256MB
to 1024MB, but I am not really sure if it is hardware or software
problem. Here is the dmesg output. If you need more information, please
feel free to ask me. Thanks a lot.


pci2: <ACPI PCI bus> on pcib2
rl0: <RealTek 8139 10/100BaseTX> port 0xcc00-0xccff mem 0xfeafff00-0xfeafffff irq 20 at device 6.0 on pci2
